summary: Well‑played show with standout drumming, though the recording source and fidelity are not described.
review: The reviewer describes a very well played concert that lived up to the long drive, highlighting especially strong post‑drum work. No comments are made about the audio source or sound quality, so the technical side remains unclear.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on soundboard vs. audience sources or any audio clarity issues.
